flowDesc: Performs end-to-end orchestration and onboarding of Cisco Meraki artifacts in Splunk ITSI

name.description: Unique identifier for the index name

enabled.description: Enable service, default will be true

data.name: create_splunk_service_kpi
data.label: Create ITSI KPIs for Meraki Wireless

base_search.description: KPI search defined by user for this KPI. All generated searches for the KPI are based on this search.

kpis.title: Active Wireless Clients
kpis.base_search: index=fabrix_meraki_metrics metric_category="Clients" earliest=-90d latest=now | where isnotnull(mac) AND mac!="" | where isnotnull(ip) AND ip!="" | eval mac=lower(trim(mac)) | eval ip=lower(trim(ip)) | stats count as active_clients by ip
kpis.description: Total number of active wireless clients in the network

kpis.title: Client Application Usage
kpis.base_search: index=fabrix_meraki_metrics metric_category="client-application-usage" earliest=-90d latest=now | where isnotnull(clientIp) AND clientIp!="" | where isnotnull(application) AND application!="" | eval clientIp=lower(trim(clientIp)) | eval application=lower(trim(application)) | stats sum(value) as app_usage by application | table application, app_usage
kpis.description: Aggregate network data usage by wireless clients

kpis.base_search: index=fabrix_meraki_metrics metric_category="Clients" metric_name="usage_total" earliest=-90d latest=now | where isnotnull(ip) AND ip!="" | eval ip=lower(trim(ip)) | stats avg(usage_total) as avg_bandwidth_usage by ip | dedup ip | table ip, avg_bandwidth_usage
kpis.title: Average Client Bandwidth Usage
kpis.description: Aggregate bandwidth usage by all wireless clients

kpis.title: Download vs Upload Ratio
kpis.base_search: index=fabrix_meraki_metrics metric_category="Clients" earliest=-90d latest=now | where isnotnull(ip) AND ip!="" | eval ip=lower(trim(ip)) | stats avg(usage_recv) as avg_download, avg(usage_sent) as avg_upload by ip | eval ratio = if(avg_upload > 0, round(avg_download / avg_upload, 2), 0) | table ip, avg_download, avg_upload, ratio
kpis.description: Measures the ratio of data upload compared to data download

kpis.title: Meraki Access Point Firmware Info
kpis.description: Measures if Access Points have expected Firmware version
kpis.base_search: index=fabrix_meraki_inventory_collection earliest=-90d latest=now | search productTypes_0="wireless" | dedup name | eval has_firmware = if(isnotnull(firmware), 1, 0) | table name, has_firmware

nodes.label: Create ITSI KPIs for Meraki Wireless

data.name: create_splunk_service_kpi
data.label: Create ITSI KPIs for Meraki Switches

base_search.description: KPI search defined by user for this KPI. All generated searches for the KPI are based on this search.

kpis.title: Device Status
kpis.base_search: index=fabrix_meraki_metrics metric_category="device-status" earliest=-90d latest=now | eval mac=lower(trim(mac)) | table mac, device_status
kpis.description: Aggregate staus of wired network devices

kpis.title: Meraki Switches Static LAN IP
kpis.base_search: index=fabrix_meraki_inventory_collection earliest=-90d latest=now | search productTypes_0="switch" | dedup name | eval static_ip = if(isnotnull(lanIp), 1, 0) | table name, static_ip
kpis.description: Number of network switches configured with static LAN IP

nodes.label: Create ITSI KPIs for Meraki Switches

data.name: create_splunk_service_kpi
data.label: Create ITSI KPIs for Meraki Sensor

base_search.description: KPI search defined by user for this KPI. All generated searches for the KPI are based on this search.

kpis.title: Meraki Sensor Geo Location Mapping
kpis.base_search: index=fabrix_meraki_inventory_collection earliest=-90d latest=now | search productTypes_0="sensor" | dedup name | eval has_location = if(isnotnull(lat) AND isnotnull(lng), 1, 0) | table name, has_location
kpis.description: Measures number of sensors enabled with geo location mapping

nodes.label: Create ITSI KPIs for Meraki Sensor

data.name: create_splunk_service_kpi
data.label: Create ITSI KPIs for Meraki Security Appliance

base_search.description: KPI search defined by user for this KPI. All generated searches for the KPI are based on this search.

kpis.title: Meraki Security Appliance with Dual WAN IPs
kpis.base_search: index=fabrix_meraki_inventory_collection earliest=-90d latest=now | search productTypes_0="appliance" | dedup name | eval dual_wan = if(isnotnull(wan1Ip) AND isnotnull(wan2Ip), 1, 0) | table name, dual_wan
kpis.description: Percentage of security appliances with dual WAN IPs

kpis.title: WAN Uplink Loss Average
kpis.base_search: index=fabrix_meraki_metrics metric_category="device-uplink-loss-latency" metric_name="lossPercent" earliest=-90d latest=now | eval ip=lower(trim(ip)) | stats avg(value) as avg_uplink_loss by ip | table ip, avg_uplink_loss
kpis.description: Average packet loss experienced over WAN uplinks

nodes.label: Create ITSI KPIs for Meraki Security Appliance

depends_on.description: Name of the service it depends on

entity_types.description: A collection of entity type definitions

entity_type_name.description: Unique identifier for the entity type

entity_type_domain.description: Domain to which the entity type belongs

data_drilldowns.description: Filters or links to raw data related to entities type

dashboard_drilldowns.description: An array of dashboard drilldown objects.

entity_types.entity_type_description: Represents a Meraki managed wireless Access Point
Represents a Meraki managed Security Appliance
Represents a Meraki managed Sensor device
Represents a Meraki managed wired Network Switch

create_import_entity_job_inputs.description: Inputs to create create import entity job

name.description: The unique name of the saved search.

search.description: The Splunk SPL query that defines what data to import.

is_scheduled.description: Flag indicating if the search runs on a schedule (1) or on demand (0).

cron_schedule.description: CRON expression that defines the schedule timing for the search.

description.description: A textual description of what the saved search does.

itsi_import_objects.description: Flag to enable ITSI import action (set to '1' to enable).

import_type.description: Type of ITSI object to import; usually 'entity' or 'service'.

conflict_action.description: Action to take when a conflict is detected, e.g. 'update' to update existing, 'skip' to ignore.

conflict_merge_field.description: Field name used to identify and merge conflicting entities or services.

column_map_title.description: Field from the search results mapped to the ITSI 'title' field (usually the entity or service name).

column_map_entity_type.description: Field indicating the type of entity, e.g., 'server', 'switch', etc.

column_map_alias.description: Comma-separated list of fields to be used as aliases for the entity.

column_map_service_name.description: Field mapped as the service name for service imports.

backfill_enabled.description: Enable backfill of historic data during import (true/false).

entity_description_fields.description: Fields to use for providing a description of the entity.

entity_field_mapping.description: Mapping of fields to entity attributes beyond the default set.

entity_identifier_fields.description: Fields used to uniquely identify an entity.

entity_informational_fields.description: Additional informational fields to be stored for the entity.

entity_merge_field.description: Field used for merging duplicate entity records.

entity_merge_fqdn.description: Fully qualified domain name field used in entity merge.

entity_status_tracking.description: Field used to track the status of an entity.

entity_title_field.description: Field to use as the display title of the entity.

entity_type_field.description: Field specifying the type/category of the entity.

field_level_update_type.description: Specifies how field-level updates are handled, e.g., 'overwrite' or 'append'.

service_dependents_fields.description: Fields that define dependent services for a service entity.

service_description_fields.description: Fields used to describe a service.

service_enabled.description: Flag indicating if the service is enabled.

service_tags_field.description: Field containing tags associated with the service.

service_team.description: Field specifying the team responsible for the service.

service_template_field.description: Field specifying the service template to use during import.

service_title_field.description: Field to be used as the display title of the service.

update_type.description: Defines the update mode, e.g., 'full' or 'incremental'.

create_import_entity_job_inputs.name: Meraki Entities Import and Update
create_import_entity_job_inputs.search: index=fabrix_meraki_inventory_collection earliest=-30d latest=now | dedup name | eval entity_name = name | eval entity_type = case(     productTypes_0 == "appliance", "Meraki Security Appliance",     productTypes_0 == "switch", "Meraki Switches",     productTypes_0 == "sensor", "Meraki Sensor",     productTypes_0 == "wireless", "Meraki Access Point",     true(), "Unknown Device" ) | search entity_type != "Unknown Device" | table entity_name entity_type name url notes timeZone isVirtual tags_0 tags_1 tags_2
create_import_entity_job_inputs.description: Import entities from main index fabrix_meraki_inventory_collection

correlation_serach_inputs.description: Correlate KPI violations and alerts within Meraki services
correlation_serach_inputs.search: index=fabrix_meraki_inventory_collection productTypes_0="switch" earliest=-120d latest=now | dedup name sortby -_time | eval is_configured=if(isnotnull(lanIp), 1, 0) | stats count as total_samples, sum(is_configured) as configured_samples by name | eval availability_pct = round((configured_samples / total_samples) * 100, 2) | eval entity_title=name, kpi_name="Meraki Switch Static LAN IP Config", service_name="Meraki Network" | where availability_pct < 95  | eval severity=case(     availability_pct < 60, 5,     availability_pct < 75, 4,     availability_pct < 95, 3,     true(), 2 ) | eval title="KPI Breach: " . kpi_name . " on " . entity_title | table _time, title, service_name, kpi_name, availability_pct, severity, entity_title | `filter_maintenance_services("87088c35-613a-4924-ae3d-c801ff3d1cda,4ccc2e91-bf89-4a74-a970-1980eddd646d")` | `apply_entity_lookup($result.entity_title$)`
correlation_serach_inputs.name: Meraki  KPI Breach Correlation

data.name: Create_notable_event_aggregation_policy
data.label: Create ITSI Notable Event Agg. Policy

keys_list.description: Comma separated list of keys that needs to be converted from string to json

notable_event_aggregation_policy_input.title: Meraki Notable Event Agg Policy
notable_event_aggregation_policy_input.filter_criteria: {"condition":"OR","items":[{"type":"clause","config":{"items":[{"type":"notable_event_field","config":{"field":"severity","operator":">=","value":"3"}},{"type":"notable_event_field","config":{"field":"description","operator":"=","value":"Test Create Notable Event Aggregation Policy API"}}],"condition":"AND"}}]}

nodes.label: Create ITSI Notable Event Agg. Policy

data.sourceLabel: Create ITSI KPIs for Meraki Wireless
Create ITSI KPIs for Meraki Switches
Create ITSI KPIs for Meraki Sensor
Create ITSI KPIs for Meraki Security Appliance
